# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "1.1"
services:
- name: service1
  url: http://service1.com
  routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
    - /api/service1
  load_balancer:
    type: round-robin

- name: service2
  url: http://service2.com
  routes:
  - name: route2
    paths:
    - /api/service2
  load_balancer:
    type: least-connections
    
upstreams:
- name: upstream1
  targets:
  - target: http://service3.com
    weight: 100
  - target: http://service4.com
    weight: 200
